issues.title: SimpleLoggerAdvisor subcribe muti times， make the chatting abort
issues.body:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e1cf3bb4-1d9a-4543-aed8-b6539cbe1ca1)


![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7865139c-1f47-46c3-839f-0aaaaf70f1c3)


![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9215b0e2-62ea-464c-bb30-ebda49e9f8a9)


every chat period， it will send one request to model，but the first one，it is Nomal， the second chat， message request becomes two messages，the third chat becomes 3 messages，。。。like the example up，finally，the model is abort  execeed limit  。

why and how to solve it 。


thx！
